label: 30_greek economy_greek_stournaras_yannis stournaras
description: Greek banks faced significant non-performing loans due to economic crises. Governor Yannis Stournaras discussed strategies for improving asset quality and the broader economic prospects of Greece, highlighting the impact on the banking sector.
